title: Marithe devil
wikitext:
[]: Mari...the devil?! (Spoilers) Post by darthikari » Sun Jun 20, 2010 4:59 pm I could be way off base here but based on several elements from 2.0/2.22, I begun to wonder if Mari isn't some form of anti-angel or demon. Let's look at the facts, She can sync with multiple Evas Unit 2 had its core removed before she used it, I mean she could have put it back, but how else do you explain how she waltzes through security the way she does? The freakish transformation she coaxes out of unit 2, seems a bit much for just a codeword. Her jubilant attitude toward destruction and mayhem. She inspires Shinji into rejoining the fight after he had had enough. After her defeat of Tunniel, she states that she dislikes involving adults with HER plans. What kind of plans could a normal 14 year old girl have on this scale? Her pink plugsuit is a mirror of Kaworu's, with the "rib" effect down the torso. And lastly, her fondness for the scent of blood.... I could be reading into this to much, but I think I'd be more suprized if she turned out to be human.

[]: Post by bladerj » Sun Jun 20, 2010 6:13 pm Right......i also think gendo is actually easter bunny, i mean he wear gloves and all.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jun 20, 2010 6:49 pm No.

[]: Post by Ramiel² » Sun Jun 20, 2010 7:04 pm bladerj wrote: Right......i also think gendo is actually easter bunny, i mean he wear gloves and all.

[]: Re: Mari...the devil?! (Spoilers) Post by NAveryW » Sun Jun 20, 2010 7:27 pm darthikari wrote: The freakish transformation she coaxes out of unit 2, seems a bit much for just a codeword.

[]: Post by Eva 04 » Sun Jun 20, 2010 10:01 pm Yeah. Your whole post sounds like a bunch of BS. Just because she does all these things doesnt mean she's a devil. Look at Shinji. His eye's glow red when he wills Unit 01 to move again after getting impaled by Zeruel and running out of power. So,by this logic,Shinji must be a devil to huh. Well,it was a good laugh anyway.

[]: Post by ran1 » Sun Jun 20, 2010 10:27 pm Honestly, some of these theories make me think that people take Anno and Yamaga for idiots.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jun 20, 2010 11:43 pm ran1 wrote: Honestly, some of these theories make me think that people take Anno and Yamaga for idiots.

[]: Mari...the devil?! (Spoilers) Post by darthikari » Sun Jun 20, 2010 4:59 pm I could be way off base here but based on several elements from 2.0/2.22, I begun to wonder if Mari isn't some form of anti-angel or demon. Let's look at the facts, She can sync with multiple Evas Unit 2 had its core removed before she used it, I mean she could have put it back, but how else do you explain how she waltzes through security the way she does? The freakish transformation she coaxes out of unit 2, seems a bit much for just a codeword. Her jubilant attitude toward destruction and mayhem. She inspires Shinji into rejoining the fight after he had had enough. After her defeat of Tunniel, she states that she dislikes involving adults with HER plans. What kind of plans could a normal 14 year old girl have on this scale? Her pink plugsuit is a mirror of Kaworu's, with the "rib" effect down the torso. And lastly, her fondness for the scent of blood.... I could be reading into this to much, but I think I'd be more suprized if she turned out to be human.
